task_completion.description: Verify the meeting title and location are set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the meeting details or creation form showing the title 'Sprint 1 Retrospective - E-Commerce Platform' and the location containing 'Room 4B' and the provided URL.

task_completion.description: Verify the meeting date, time, and duration are set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the date '2025-02-10', start time '14:00' (or 2:00 PM), and duration of '1.5' hours (or 1:30 / 90 minutes) in the meeting schedule details.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct participants are invited to the meeting.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the names 'Alice Johnson', 'Bob Smith', and 'Carol Williams' in the participants, attendees, or invitees list for the meeting.

task_completion.description: Verify the four specific agenda items are added in the correct order.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an agenda list containing: 1. 'Sprint 1 velocity and burndown review', 2. 'What went well', 3. 'What needs improvement', and 4. 'Action items for Sprint 2'.

task_completion.description: Verify the meeting notes are recorded under the first agenda item.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the meeting minutes/notes section specifically under the first agenda item ('Sprint 1 velocity...') containing the text mentioning '34 story points' and 'Elasticsearch'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the OpenProject web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show the OpenProject web application in a browser, not a text editor or API testing tool.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal should not show curl commands, database scripts, or API calls used to create the meeting directly.

integrity.description: Verify the meeting was actually saved and displayed in the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show the final saved state of the meeting in OpenProject, not just text typed into unsaved form fields or modified HTML.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The meeting must be in the 'E-Commerce Platform' project (identifier: ecommerce-platform). Expected title fragment: 'sprint 1 retrospective'. Expected location fragment: 'room 4b'. Start date: '2025-02-10'. Duration: 1.5 hours. Required participants: 'alice johnson', 'bob smith', 'carol williams'. Required agenda items: 'velocity', 'went well', 'needs improvement', 'action items'. Notes for the first agenda item must contain '34 story points' and 'elasticsearch'.
